dropped_quotes.title: Trust as a through line
dropped_quotes.quote: for every bad experience that you have... you have 10 positive experiences to basically cancel that out... Trust... is very difficult to earn, and it is very easy to break.

dropped_quotes.quote: sometimes AI is a little bit like junk food. You like kind of it's like super tasty, crave it... And then afterwards, you're kind of you're looking at the packaging and you're a bit regretful and what you've created is a bit hollow.

dropped_quotes.title: Scaling taste, craft, and quality in the AI era
dropped_quotes.quote: we'll be swimming in some slop for for a while, but that's okay because... the great work will always rise above it.
